note: Implementing bidirectional store-and-forward ring: 2 workers/device (fwd core (0,0), bwd core (0,1)), each with reader(NCRISC)+writer(BRISC). Barrier via multicast_inc on barrier_sem, flow-control via counting_sem. Store-and-forward through output DRAM. gather_dim=0 page-contiguous, Linear topology.
plan: reader reads seed from input + relay read-backs from output DRAM gated by counting_sem; writer does self-copy(fwd) + fabric forward + counting inc per block; barrier phase 1

detail: 5/5 bf16 TILE gather_dim_0 cases PASS on wh_t3k sim (1,8) FABRIC_1D. Ring+barrier+counting+self-copy all correct first try. shapes: single-tile, multi-tile, non-square, multi-batch, non-tile-aligned.
ALL 22 acceptance tests PASS on wh_t3k sim (1,8) FABRIC_1D: 5 bf16-TILE + 5 bf16-RM + 10 fp32(TILE+RM) gather_dim_0 + program_cache + output_tensor. PCC>=thresholds.
